message:
fix: address Copilot review comments on RepoSubtitle from #8682 (#8701)

- Use proper TypeScript narrowing for shared?.repoFilter
- Align font size between RepoSubtitle and WorkflowMatrix header (text-xs)
- Add min-w-0 for proper truncation in flex layouts

Fixes #8697

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
